# Performance-based design

Author1, Author2, and Author3

<span style="color: red;">ALL CONTENT IN THIS REPORT IS PRELIMINARY AND DRAFT. DO NOT REFERENCE FOR ANY PURPOSE.</span>

Key topics:  

- Iterative design workflows.  
- Integrated modeling to inform design.  
- Hazard-resilient design and reliability analysis.  
- Adaptability to shifting baselines: climate, land use, population growth.
